title: citrus elkantara
intro: Citrus elkantara, also known as the Dalandan, is a species of citrus fruit-bearing tree native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, and its medicinal properties include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Citrus elkantara include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Citrus elkantara include teas, infusions, and juices, which are often used to combat various health conditions.
